narrative.narrative: Bitcoin's 30-day momentum has stalled as fading ETF inflows and a softening BTC dominance signal capital rotation into risk-off positioning, driving the Fear & Greed Index to 31. This setup closely mirrors the August 2024 bottoming pattern, where a similar exhaustion in sell-side pressure preceded a sharp mean-reversion rally. The market is coiling in a sideways regime, punishing both premature breakouts and panic sells.
narrative.headline: Exhausted Sellers Coil at the August Blueprint

next_move.outlook: The narrative arc suggests this anxiety phase resolves with a liquidity sweep of the range lows before a reflexive recovery, mirroring the August 2024 structure.

consensus.key_reasoning: Score at 31 anchors in Panic (24-31); the analyst's call of Anxiety (39-46) is two rungs away and illegal, so I step up one to Denial (32-38), which fits the post-flush stall where participants refuse the downtrend but no breaker has fired. Both brains agree on a sideways coil, but the analyst's higher trust weight and the absence of funding/stablecoin confirmation justify caution over the narrative's bullish accumulation lean.

Analyst confidence 0.55 vs narrative confidence 0.78 — narrative more convinced of the August analog than the analyst.
